title: Explore Google Cloud Documentation
description: Navigate the official Google Cloud documentation — find the Google Cloud Overview using AI-powered browser automation.

tasks.title: Find the Google Cloud Overview
tasks.sonic_prompt: Let me navigate to the official Google Cloud documentation and find the overview page for you.

subtasks.title: Open the browser
subtasks.sonic_prompt: First, I will open the browser.
subtasks.goal: Open the web browser. If a browser is already open, bring it to the foreground.

subtasks.title: Navigate to Google Cloud Docs
subtasks.sonic_prompt: Now I will navigate to the Google Cloud documentation page.
subtasks.goal: In the browser, click on the address bar and type https://cloud.google.com/docs and press Enter. Wait for the Google Cloud documentation page to load.

subtasks.title: Click on Google Cloud overview
subtasks.sonic_prompt: Now I will find and click on the Google Cloud overview link.
subtasks.goal: On the Google Cloud documentation page, find and click the 'Google Cloud overview' hyperlink. Wait for the overview page to load.
